prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组（含物理类）最低位次依次约 5337→6028→22358→18059→5147。2023–2024 年因含宏福校区（异地校区）批次导致最低位次大幅后移，2025 年回归主校区物理类（102）组 5147 名，近两年主校区实际位次稳定在 5100–5600 区间。2025 年基准位次约 5147 名；本省理科组计划 2021 年 127 人、2022 年 126 人、2023 年 129 人、2024 年 130 人、2025 年 136 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 195 人，较 2025 年扩招约 43.4%，为近年最大扩招幅度，显著增加录取名额，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 54 位持续上升至 2026 年第 50 位，首次进入全国前 50，排名提升反映综合实力与声誉增强；声誉文件中未收录该校明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第 64 位、评价「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见报考过热或过冷信号；近年无投档断档记录；信息与通信工程 A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术 A、电子科学与技术 A-、网络空间安全 A-、软件工程 A-、光学工程 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，在信息通信领域具有显著学科优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（2024 年 ，推荐）、电子信息/通信（2024 年 ，高热推荐）持续高热，与北邮核心专业高度匹配，吸引高分考生报考；本省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万（较 2025 年增长约 32%），按近年物理类占比约 61% 估算，物理类考生约 73.6 万，较 2025 年 55.5 万增长约 32.6%，考生规模大幅增加加剧竞争；该校位于北京，属一线城市热门高校，对河南考生有较强跨省吸引力；本校在河南招生占比近年约 1.3%–1.6%（2024 年 14 人/全国 759 人），非主要生源地，但扩招后河南占比将明显提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5147、2026 年大幅扩招 43.4%（缓解竞争）、软科排名升至第 50 位（增强吸引力）、计算机/电子信息专业持续高热（吸引高分考生）、本省物理类考生增长约 32.6%（加剧竞争）等多重因素，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，但学校排名上升和热门专业热度将吸引更多高分考生竞争，预计最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约 6517 名，区间 6017–7017 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 6017–7017 名内，建议以二档专业（计算机类、通信工程、电子信息类、人工智能）为主攻方向，一档元班专业（计算机类元班、电子信息类元班）作为冲刺，三档专业（自动化类、软件工 程、网络空间安全）作为稳妥保底。位次优于区间下限（<6017 名）可重点冲刺一档元班及二档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group (including physics category) were approximately 5337→6028→22358→18059→5147. In 2023–2024, due to the inclusion of the Hongfu campus (off-site campus) batch, the minimum rankings significantly dropped. In 2025, the main campus physics category (102) group returned to 5147, with the actual rankings of the main campus stabilizing in the 5100–5600 range in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5147. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 127 in 2021, 126 in 2022, 129 in 2023, 130 in 2024, and 136 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 195, an expansion of about 43.4% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing admission slots and alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has risen from 54th in 2021 to 50th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation. The reputation file does not include significant negative public opinion incidents about this university. Douyin popularity ranking is 64th, with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate short video exposure without signs of excessive or insufficient application enthusiasm. No record of enrollment gaps in recent years. Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, showing significant disciplinary advantages in the information and communication field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (2024, recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (2024, highly recommended) remain highly popular, highly matching BUPT's core majors, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025). Estimating the physics category proportion at about 61% in recent years, the number of physics category candidates is about 736,000, an increase of about 32.6% compared to 555,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city popular among universities, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Henan candidates. The proportion of enrollment from Henan in recent years is about 1.3%–1.6% (14 out of 759 nationally in 2024), not a major source province, but after expansion, the Henan proportion will significantly increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5147, the significant 43.4% expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the Soft Science ranking rising to 50th (enhancing appeal), the sustained high popularity of computer/electronic information majors (attracting high-scoring candidates), and the approximately 32.6% increase in provincial physics category candidates (intensifying competition), the expansion rate exceeds the candidate growth rate, but the rising school ranking and hot major popularity will attract more high-scoring candidates to compete. The minimum admission ranking is expected to slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6517, with a range of 6017–7017.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6017–7017, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence) as the main direction, Tier 1 Yuan Class majors (Computer Science Yuan Class, Electronic Information Yuan Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Automation, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security) as a safe backup. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<6017), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Yuan Class and Tier 2 popular majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科组（含历史类）最低位次依次约 2380→2334→2356→2855→2375，整体在 2300–2900 区间窄幅波动，2024 年因英语专业位次后移导致最低位次扩大至 2855，2025 年回归 2375 名。2025 年基准位次约 2375 名；本省文科组计划 2021–2022 年各 14 人、2023 年 12 人、2024–2025 年各 13 人；2026 年计划 13 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名 2026 年第 50 位，较 2025 年第 60 位明显上升，综合实力与声誉持续增强；声誉文件中未收录该校明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 64 位、评价「一般」，未见报考过热或过冷信号；近年无投档断档记录；该校优势学科集中于信息通信领域（信息与通信工程 A+、计算机 A 等），文科专业（法学、网络与新媒体、英语、公共事业管理）非学校核心优势学科，学科评估覆盖有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学（2024 年 ，分化观望）热度中等偏上但分化明显；外语类（2024 年 ，一般观望）热度平稳；本省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万，按近年历史类占比约 39% 估算，历史类考生约 46.4 万，较 2025 年 35.2 万增长约 31.8%，考生规模大幅增加；该校位于北京，对河南文科考生有一定跨省吸引力，但文科专业设置较少（仅 4 个），选择空间有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2375、2026 年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生增长约 31.8%（竞争加剧）、软科排名上升（增强整体吸引力）、文科专业非该校核心优势等因素，计划不变而考生大增将推高竞争烈度，预计最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约 2400 名，区间 2040–2760 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including history category) were approximately 2380→2334→2356→2855→2375, fluctuating narrowly within the 2300–2900 range. In 2024, the English major's ranking decline caused the minimum ranking to expand to 2855, but it returned to 2375 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2375. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 14 students each in 2021–2022, 12 in 2023, and 13 each in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 13 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 50th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, a significant rise from 60th in 2025, indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength and reputation. No significant negative public opinion was found in reputation documents. Douyin popularity ranks 64th with an 'average' rating, showing no signs of excessive heat or coldness in applications. No recent enrollment gaps have been recorded. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in information and communication fields (Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science A, etc.), while liberal arts majors (Law, Network and New Media, English, Public Administration) are not core strengths, with limited discipline evaluation coverage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (2024, differentiation and wait-and-see) has moderately high but clearly differentiated popularity; foreign language majors (2024, average wait-and-see) have stable popularity. The province's total number of examinees in 2026 is about 1.2 million, with history category examinees estimated at about 464,000 based on the recent history category proportion of about 39%, a significant increase of about 31.8% from 352,000 in 2025. The university is located in Beijing, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Henan liberal arts examinees, but has few liberal arts majors (only 4), limiting choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2375, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, about 31.8% increase in provincial history category examinees (intensified competition), rising Soft Science ranking (enhanced overall appeal), and liberal arts majors not being the university's core strengths, the unchanged plan combined with a large increase in examinees will raise competition intensity. The minimum admission ranking is expected to slightly decline compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 2400, with a range of 2040–2760.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2040–2760, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Network and New Media, English) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Law (Joint Degree) as a reach and Tier 3 Public Administration as a safety. Rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<2040) can focus on reaching for the Law major.
